salmanshh_2dwater.name: 2DWater
salmanshh_2dwater.description: Interactive 2D water for Sprites and Tiled Backgrounds with ripples, auto-waves, Physics splashes, buoyancy controls, and live surface queries.

tension.name: Tension
tension.desc: Spring stiffness pulling each column toward its rest height. Low values produce slow, wide waves. High values produce tight, fast ripples.

dampening.name: Dampening
dampening.desc: Energy decay per tick. High values produce thick, viscous water. Low values allow long oscillation.

spread.name: Spread
spread.desc: Lateral propagation rate between adjacent columns. Controls how fast a disturbance travels horizontally.

meshColumns.name: Mesh Columns
meshColumns.desc: Number of simulation columns and mesh control points on the top row. Minimum 2, clamped at init. Can be changed at runtime via SetMeshColumns.

meshRows.name: Mesh Rows
meshRows.desc: Number of mesh rows. Only row 0 (the top edge) is deformed by the simulation. Minimum 2, clamped at init.

autoWaves.name: Enable Auto-Waves
autoWaves.desc: Continuously drives sinusoidal surface motion without any ApplyForce calls. When enabled, idle detection is bypassed.

waveLength.name: Wave Length
waveLength.desc: Spatial wavelength of auto-waves in pixels.

period.name: Period
period.desc: Time in seconds for one full auto-wave cycle. Setting to 0 freezes phase accumulation.

magnitude.name: Magnitude
magnitude.desc: Amplitude of auto-waves in pixels above the rest surface.

autoPhysicsForce.name: Auto Physics Splash
autoPhysicsForce.desc: When enabled, automatically applies a splash impulse when a Physics-behavior instance overlaps the water object. You can exclude specific instances from auto-splash with the ClearInstanceSplashSetting action.

physicsForceMultiplier.name: Physics Splash Force Multiplier
physicsForceMultiplier.desc: Scales the impacting instance's velocityY to a splash force magnitude.

physicsSurfaceRadius.name: Physics Splash Surface Radius
physicsSurfaceRadius.desc: Horizontal splash radius in pixels for Physics auto-impacts.

idleThreshold.name: Idle Threshold
idleThreshold.desc: Maximum absolute column speed below which the simulation is considered at rest and ticking halts. 0 disables idle detection. Isn't used when Auto-Waves is enabled.

spreadPassCount.name: Spread Pass Count
spreadPassCount.desc: Number of lateral spread iterations per tick. Min 1, max 16. Reduce for background water.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.desc: Whether the water behavior is active. When disabled, the simulation is paused.

SetMeshColumns.description: Changes the number of simulation columns at runtime. Wave state is resampled. Do not call every tick.

columns.name: Columns
columns.desc: Number of columns. Values below 2 are clamped to 2.

SetMeshRows.description: Changes the number of mesh rows at runtime. Column simulation state is preserved. Do not call every tick.

rows.name: Rows
rows.desc: Number of rows. Values below 2 are clamped to 2.

SetFixedSimStep.display-text: Set fixed simulation step to {0} seconds
SetFixedSimStep.description: Sets the fixed simulation step in seconds. Clamped to [1/240FPS, 1/15FPS].

seconds.name: Seconds
seconds.desc: Fixed simulation step size in seconds.

SetIdleThreshold.description: Sets the idle detection speed threshold at runtime. 0 disables idle detection.

threshold.name: Threshold
threshold.desc: Max absolute column speed to be considered idle.

SetMaxSimStepsPerTick.list-name: Set max simulation steps per tick
SetMaxSimStepsPerTick.display-text: Set max simulation steps per tick to {0}
SetMaxSimStepsPerTick.description: Sets the maximum fixed simulation steps processed per tick. Clamped to [1, 20]. Higher values recover from hitches better but can increase per-frame cost.

steps.name: Steps
steps.desc: Maximum fixed simulation steps processed per tick.

SetOffscreenAutoWaveLightweightModeEnabl.display-text: Set off-screen auto-wave lightweight mode to {0}
SetOffscreenAutoWaveLightweightModeEnabl.description: Performance saver for off-screen water with auto-waves. When enabled, the behavior only advances wave phase and reconstructs the surface directly, skipping spring/spread simulation. Trade-off: hidden ripple dynamics and force interactions are not simulated while this mode is active.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.desc: True to enable off-screen auto-wave lightweight mode.

SetSpreadPassCount.description: Sets the number of spread pass iterations per tick. Clamped to [1, 16].

ApplyForce.display-text: Apply splash force at X {0} with force {1} and radius {2}
ApplyForce.description: Applies a vertical impulse to the water surface at a world X coordinate. Does not require any object or Physics behavior — use this to manually trigger splashes from events or script.

x.name: X
x.desc: World X coordinate of the impact.

force.name: Force
force.desc: Force magnitude. Positive = upward displacement, negative = downward.

ClearInstanceSplashSetting.description: Removes the per-instance override for the chosen setting, falling back to the object-type override or water default. Only relevant if the instance has the Physics behavior attached.

ClearObjectTypeSplashSetting.description: Removes the object-type override for the chosen setting, reverting to the water default. Only relevant for objects that have the Physics behavior attached.

SetDefaultSplashSetting.description: Sets the water-wide fallback value for a splash setting. Applies to all objects with the Physics behavior that enter the water, unless overridden per object type or per UID.

value.name: Value
value.desc: New value for the selected splash setting.

SetInstanceSplashSetting.display-text: Set splash setting {1} for UID {0} to {2}
SetInstanceSplashSetting.description: Overrides a splash setting for a single instance by UID. Only affects the instance if it has the Physics behavior attached. Takes priority over any object-type or water default.

uid.name: UID
uid.desc: Target instance UID. The instance must have the Physics behavior attached to be affected.

value.name: Value
value.desc: New value for the selected splash setting.

SetObjectTypeSplashSetting.description: Overrides a splash setting for all instances of the chosen object type. Only affects objects that have the Physics behavior attached. Takes priority over the water default but can be overridden per UID.

objectTypeName.name: Object type
objectTypeName.desc: Pick an object type. Instances of this type must have the Physics behavior attached to be affected.

value.name: Value
value.desc: New value for the selected splash setting.

SetPhysicsAutoSplashEnabled.description: Enables or disables automatic splash detection. When enabled, the water monitors all objects with the Physics behavior and creates splashes when they enter or exit the water surface. Objects must have the Physics behavior attached to be detected.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.desc: True to enable auto-splash detection for Physics-behavior objects.

FlattenSurface.description: Instantly moves the current surface toward flat by a percentage. 100 fully flattens it; 0 leaves it unchanged.

percentage.name: Percentage
percentage.desc: How much of the current disturbance to remove. Clamped from 0 to 100.

SetDampening.description: Sets the energy decay rate at runtime.

SetEnabled.description: Enables or disables the water behavior. When disabled, the simulation is paused and ticking stops.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.desc: True to enable the behavior, false to disable it.

SetSpread.description: Sets the lateral propagation rate at runtime.

SetTension.description: Sets the spring constant at runtime.

SetMagnitude.description: Sets the auto-wave amplitude in pixels.

SetPeriod.description: Sets the auto-wave cycle duration in seconds. 0 freezes phase accumulation.

SetWaveLength.description: Sets the spatial wavelength of auto-waves in pixels.

OnPhysicsImpact.description: Fires once per Physics instance per surface zone entry. Pass 0 to fire for any impacting instance.

instanceUID.name: Instance UID
instanceUID.desc: UID to filter for, or 0 for any.

IsAutoWavesEnabled.description: True if auto-wave oscillation is currently active.

IsEnabled.description: True if the water behavior is currently enabled.

IsIdle.description: True if the simulation has stopped ticking due to idle detection.

IsPhysicsAutoForceEnabled.description: True if Physics auto-force detection is currently active.

ImpactForce.description: The computed force applied to the surface. Valid inside OnPhysicsImpact only.

ImpactUID.description: UID of the impacting Physics instance. Valid inside OnPhysicsImpact only.

ImpactX.description: World X coordinate of the Physics impact. Valid inside OnPhysicsImpact only.

FixedSimStep.description: Current fixed simulation step in seconds.

MaxSimStepsPerTick.description: Current max fixed simulation steps processed per tick.

InstanceSplashValue.description: Returns the effective splash setting value for the given UID, resolving UID override first, then object-type override, then water default. Does not require the Physics behavior to query.

setting.name: Setting
setting.desc: Which splash setting to return: force_multiplier or surface_radius.

ObjectTypeSplashValue.description: Returns the effective splash setting value for the given object type (or its name), applying the object-type override if set, then falling back to the water default. Does not require the Physics behavior to query.

objectTypeName.name: Object type
objectTypeName.desc: Object type or object type name.

setting.name: Setting
setting.desc: Which splash setting to return: force_multiplier or surface_radius.

AutoWaveEnabled.description: 1 if auto-waves are currently enabled, 0 if disabled.

SurfaceNormal.description: Upward surface normal angle in radians for the water surface at world X position x.

SurfaceNormalAngle.description: Upward surface normal angle in degrees from 0 to 360 for the water surface at world X position x.

SurfaceY.description: World Y of the water surface at world X position x.
